description_long: This is a muscular adult male figure with a bare torso, wearing a wide-brimmed hat, sunglasses, and a necklace with red beads and a medallion. He has prominent tattoos on his left arm and a large, stylized tattoo across his upper back. His attire includes loose, knee-length shorts with a belt, utility pouches, and a holstered item at his right hip. He wears wristbands and a bracelet, and his footwear consists of sturdy, high-ankle boots with metallic accents. The figure's accessories and confident stance suggest a streetwise, adventurous character suited for urban environments.
description: Muscular adult male with a bare torso, tattoos, wide-brimmed hat, utility shorts, and high-ankle boots, accessorized with jewelry and pouches.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bare chest, necklace, sunglasses, hat, tattoos on the left arm, and utility shorts with visible pouches and boots.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the arm tattoo, holstered item at the hip, and the profile of the hat and boots.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the large back tattoo, the back of the hat, shorts, and boots, as well as the placement of pouches and holster.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the right arm, bracelet, and the side profile of the shorts, pouches, and boots.
attribute_clothing_type: wide-brimmed hat, loose knee-length shorts with utility pouches, necklace, wristbands, and high-ankle boots
